description: Head-shot circular magnetization on a solid steel shaft clamped between contact heads: axial current arrow (draw), circumferential flux hoops with direction chevrons perpendicular to the current (draw), one tight longitudinal seam/quench crack parallel to the axis crossing the hoops at 90 degrees (draw + ping), then leakage-flux bristles at each hoop crossing and an amber particle-indication glow building along the crack (fade). Labels: CURRENT (I), FLUX (B), SEAM / QUENCH CRACK, INDICATION.
